import io

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut depth = 0
mut bad = false
mut i = 0
let n = line.len()
while i < n
  let b = line.get(i)
  match b
  when Some(c)
    if c == 40
      depth = depth + 1
    else if c == 41
      if depth == 0
        bad = true
      else
        depth = depth - 1
      end
    end
  when None
    bad = bad
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if bad or depth != 0
  print("NO")
else
  print("YES")
end
